name: Oscar Properties Holding AB (publ)
summary: Oscar Properties Holding AB (publ) acquires, develops, and markets real estate properties in Stockholm. The company develops homes through new build developments, as well as through the conversion of former industrial, office, school, factory, post office, and other buildings. It also provides property management services. Oscar Properties Holding AB (publ) was founded in 2004 and is based in Stockholm, Sweden.
